sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Blocks back at starting position: orange at [[40, 29], [40, 33], [41, 33], [41, 29]]
# This is the initial position of level 2
# The DOWN movement from top-right wrapped around to the start

# Let me try a different path: RIGHT then DOWN to reach the white cross
# First, go RIGHT to move toward the right passage
result = action(['RIGHT'])
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'O':
        print(f"After RIGHT - Orange: {n['boundary']}")
        break
print("Board changed:", result.get('board_changed'))

# Try RIGHT again
if result.get('board_changed'):
    result2 = action(['RIGHT'])
    seg = current_frame.segmentation
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        if n['color'] == 'O':
            print(f"After RIGHT2 - Orange: {n['boundary']}")
            break
    print("Board changed:", result2.get('board_changed'))

# Try RIGHT again
if result2.get('board_changed'):
    result3 = action(['RIGHT'])
    seg = current_frame.segmentation
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        if n['color'] == 'O':
            print(f"After RIGHT3 - Orange: {n['boundary']}")
            break
    print("Board changed:", result3.get('board_changed'))

# Try RIGHT again
if result3.get('board_changed'):
    result4 = action(['RIGHT'])
    seg = current_frame.segmentation
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        if n['color'] == 'O':
            print(f"After RIGHT4 - Orange: {n['boundary']}")
            break
    print("Board changed:", result4.get('board_changed'))
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
